title: Can`t connection to sql database
author: Traineratwot
body_snippet:
![screenshot](https://i.imgur.com/498FrcY.png)

I create Database by [wiki](https://mremoteng.readthedocs.io/en/latest/sql_configuration.html?highlight=sql),
enter my connection data,
and get that error

[dump my database without data](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1iyWfdB1rPdC1AawauG6V8Hz7Pw_bWy0t/view?usp=sharing)

`Unable to cast object of type 'System.DBNull' to type 'System.String'.`
```
   at mRemoteNG.Config.Serializers.MsSql.DataTableDeserializer.PopulateConnectionInfoFromDat...

iterations.description: Users are reporting an inability to connect to a SQL database for connection storage, indicating a critical bug in a core feature.

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: Yes we know its an issue, could you try an nightly build ?

comments.author: Traineratwot
comments.snippet:
I try nightly build.

It looks like I misunderstood what the problem is, apparently I have a wrongly created database
![https://i.imgur.com/nPW94iy.jpeg ](img)

Previously, I manually added columns without which I received an error

Where can I find an up-to-date one for the night build?
SQL query to create datatbase?

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage (gemini): Users are reporting an inability to connect to a SQL database for connection storage, indicating a critical bug in a core feature.
Approach: Investigate the SQL connection establishment and authentication process within the `mRemoteNG.Config.DatabaseConnectors` namespace and related UI components to pinpoint the failure point.
